title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a marketplace for Archon, a workflow platform that lets users define YAML-based agentic engineering workflows. The marketplace enables one-click installation and sharing of pre-built workflows across users, with support for isolated git worktrees and multiple model providers.
